Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' occurrences across all cases
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities

Name: Percentage of process variants that include 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all cases

Name: Number of times 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' is directly preceded by 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities

Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' that occurs after 'SW-EIC Accept'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' relative to the frequency of 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Number of process instances where 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' appears exactly once
Metric: the sum of the function base == 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Percentage of cases containing 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' that ultimately conclude with a final manuscript export (i.e., end with 'Manuscript Export Succeeded')
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Frequency of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' compared to other post-acceptance activities such as 'First Look-Please submit updates'
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities for cases where activity 'First Look-Please submit updates' occurs

Name: Percentage of variants in which 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' follows a sequence starting with 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and including at least one 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Number of times 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' occurs in cases that also include the activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Ratio of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' occurrences to total number of accepted manuscripts (proxied by occurrences of 'SW-EIC Accept' or 'RW-EIC Accept')
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' events that are part of the final phase of the review process (i.e., appear after any 'EIC Decision' activity)
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Frequency of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' in variants with performance duration above the median case duration
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities

Name: Frequency of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' in variants that originate from a major revision cycle (i.e., contain 'SW–Major Revision due in 1 month' or similar)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'SW–Major Revision due in 1 month'"}"
